'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 126''' was the one hundred twenty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 26]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Rich Handley]], [[Matthew Harvey]] and [[James McFadden]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*Galactic Food and Drink
